data.title: Why Is NetApp (NTAP) Stock Trending Overnight
data.description: NetApp Inc. (NASDAQ: NTAP) saw a rise in shares on Wednesday, with a 0.22% increase in after-hours trading to $112.05 following the announcement of their reception of the 2026 Google Cloud Infrastructure Modernization Partner of the Year for Storage Award. This marks the seventh such recognition for the company. Google (NASDAQ: GOOG) (NASDAQ: GOOGL) stated that the award is given to partners excelling in aiding customers in migrating to, building on, and optimizing their infrastructure on Google Cloud. Kevin Ichhpurani, a Google Cloud executive, praised NetApp for their success in driving customer outcomes over the past year. Pravjit Tiwana, senior VP and GM of Cloud Storage at NetApp, emphasized the importance of customer satisfaction in this achievement.

data.title: Iconic British Brand Laura Ashley launches Four Fragrances Inspired by Archival Prints
data.description: In London on April 22, 2026, the well-known British company Laura Ashley announced a collaboration with Nirvana Brands to introduce a new Parfum Collection comprising of four fragrances. These scents draw inspiration from the British countryside and are based on prints from Laura Ashley's collection. The partnership aims to create a unique olfactory experience for customers, combining the brand's heritage with the expertise of Nirvana Brands in fragrance making. This collection showcases the essence of British landscapes in each perfume, offering a distinctive sensory journey.

data.title: Netceed Publishes Its First Environmental, Social and Governance Report
data.description: Netceed, a worldwide supplier of infrastructure solutions, recently released their inaugural Annual Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) Report from EAUBONNE, France. This signifies a significant advancement in the company's sustainability efforts and demonstrates their dedication to openness, responsibility, and ethical business conduct. The report outlines Netceed's advancements in environmental, social, and governance areas, and confirms the verification of its carbon footprint data by a reputable source. This demonstrates the company's commitment to promoting sustainability and transparency in their operations.

data.title: Nasdaq Dips Over 100 Points Amid Iran Ceasefire Jitters: Investor Sentiment Declines, But Fear Index Remains In 'Greed' Zone
data.description: The CNN Money Fear and Greed index showed a decline in market sentiment but remained in the "Greed" zone, reflecting investors' positivity. On Tuesday, the U.S. stocks saw a dip, particularly the Nasdaq Composite which dropped more than 100 points due to rising crude oil prices. Pakistan's information minister mentioned awaiting a formal response from Iran regarding the delegation for Islamabad peace talks by midday. Traders were cautious amid the uncertainty of a potential breakthrough or escalation in the Strait of Hormuz. In terms of earnings, GE Aerospace (NYSE: GE) exceeded expectations for the first quarter. UnitedHealth Group Inc. (NYSE: UNH) witnessed a 7% increase in shares on the same day. For more details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: IONCHI Welcomes AITO to Join Hands with BMW and Mercedes-Benz to Develop Premium High-Power Charging Networks in China
data.description: In Beijing, the high-power charging services joint venture IONCHI, involving BMW and Mercedes-Benz, welcomed SERES as an equal shareholder. AITO, the SERES Group's premium brand, will aid in the advancement of IONCHI's premium charging infrastructure through this investment. This move further enhances IONCHI's ability to offer high-quality charging services utilizing advanced technology and digital solutions to a wide range of vehicles.

data.title: Top Wall Street Forecasters Revamp Boston Scientific Expectations Ahead Of Q1 Earnings
data.description: Before the market opens on Wednesday, April 22, Boston Scientific Corporation (NYSE: BSX) will announce its first-quarter earnings. Analysts are predicting earnings of 79 cents per share, up from 75 cents per share last year. The company is expected to report quarterly revenue of $5.17 billion, an increase from $4.66 billion in the same period last year. Recently, the company revealed data from its HI-PEITHO clinical trial for the EKOS Endovascular System in pulmonary embolism patients. Boston Scientific's stock fell 2.4% to $59.52 on Tuesday. For more detailed information, including the latest analyst ratings, visit Benzinga's website.

data.title: Satoshi Nakamoto Likely To Move Their Bitcoin In 2026? Here's What The Biggest Prediction Markets Are Saying
data.description: The dormant Bitcoin holdings attributed to Satoshi Nakamoto are the subject of prediction markets, which suggest it will remain untouched until 2026. Odds of the mysterious creator moving their BTC this year are at a low 9% on Polymarket, with Kalshi bettors giving it an 8% chance. Over $2.6 million has been wagered on Polymarket regarding this outcome. The market outcome hinges on on-chain analytics firm Arkham confirming an "Outflow" or "Swaps" transaction from a Nakamoto-linked wallet. For further details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Omantel embarks on major BSS/OSS transformation with Cerillion
data.description: A recent announcement reveals the launch of a new sovereign cloud deployment at Oman Data Park, which will play a pivotal role in Omantel's transition from a traditional telecom company to a more tech-focused entity. The initiative, unveiled on April 22, 2026 in London, will involve Cerillion (AIM: CER), a prominent provider of composable BSS/OSS solutions for telecom operators. This move signifies a significant digital transformation for Omantel and marks a crucial milestone in its strategic evolution.

data.title: Luckin Coffee's Smart Roasting Center Commences Operation
data.description: Luckin Coffee, a prominent retail coffee chain based in Qingdao, China, disclosed that it has initiated operations at its state-of-the-art smart roasting center after a significant investment of RMB 3 billion. The move is aimed at boosting the Company’s supply chain resilience. This development was announced on April 22, 2026, without specifying the source.

data.title: AT&T, Tesla And 3 Stocks To Watch Heading Into Wednesday
data.description: Stock futures in the U.S. are showing an upward trend today, with investor attention likely focused on Tesla Inc (NASDAQ: TSLA) and Capital One Financial Corp. (NYSE: COF). Analysts are anticipating Tesla to announce earnings of 37 cents per share, with revenue expected to reach $22.71 billion. In after-hours trading, Tesla's stock saw a 0.7% increase, reaching $388.99. On the other hand, Capital One reported first-quarter earnings of $4.42 per share, falling short of the estimated $4.55. Their quarterly revenue also fell below expectations at $15.23 billion. For more details, the full article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: GE Vernova Gears Up For Q1 Print; Here Are The Recent Forecast Changes From Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts
data.description: GE Vernova Inc. (NYSE: GEV) is set to unveil its first-quarter earnings on Wednesday, April 22. Analysts are predicting earnings to reach $2.02 per share, a significant increase from 91 cents per share in the same period last year. Expectations for quarterly revenue stand at $9.26 billion, up from $8.03 billion in the previous year. The company recently announced a partnership with Hitachi to potentially deploy a BWRX-300 small modular reactor in Southeast Asia. Closing at $991.30 on Tuesday, GE Vernova's shares saw a modest uptick of 0.1%. For more details and the latest analyst ratings, readers can visit the Analyst Stock Ratings page.
